CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Set For Trial On Apr-02-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher S. Hicks, Esq. of Kern Segal & Murray, T:415.474.1900, for defendant Makableh;
Ernesto Sanchez, Esq. of Liberation Law Group PC, T:415.695.1000, for plaintiff;
Andrea D. McGary, Esq. of The McGary Firm, T:415.874.3500, for plaintiff, on Cour Call.

RULING: The tentative ruling was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT THOUQAN MAKABLEH'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT as follows:

Defendant Thouqan Makableh's motion to set aside the May 22, 2017 judgment entered against him is GRANTED. Mr. Makableh has shown that he is entitled to set aside the judgment per CCP 473.5. While plaintiff Alfonso Peralta does not believe the statements in Mr. Makableh's declaration, he has not shown that those statements are untrue. Mr. Makableh has leave to file his proposed answer by February 14, 2018.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-22-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for trial/no appearance by defendants.
Department 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Ernesto Sanchez, Esq., appearing on behalf of Plaintiff Alfonso Gonzalez Peralta.
Witness Alfonso Gonzalez Peralta sworn and examined with the assistance of Flora Martinez as Spanish interpreter.
No appearance on behalf of or by Defendants Adil Elmakhzoumi, Thouqan Makableh and Wesam Shohatra, individuals doing business as La Mission Market.
Defaults were previously entered against Thouqan Makableh and Wesam Shohatra, individuals doing business as La Mission Market.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1 - Wage spreadsheet - marked for identification and admitted into Evidence
Plaintiff's Exhibit 2 - Search results for Mission Market - marked for identification and admitted into Evidence
Plaintiff's Exhibit 3 - Copies of paystubs - marked for identification and admitted into Evidence
Plaintiff's Exhibit 4 - Copies of checks - marked for identification and admitted into Evidence
Plaintiff's Exhibit 5 - Spreadsheet calculating principal and interest - marked for identification and admitted into Evidence

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Alfonso Gonzalez Peralta and against Defendants Adil Elmakhzoumi, Thouqan Makableh and Wesam Shohatra, individuals doing business as La Mission Market as follows:
Principal $260,931.25
Pre-Judgment Interest $91,719.12
Attorney's Fees $5,760.00
Costs $1,062.91
Total Judgment in the amount of $359,473.28
Judgment signed in open court.
